captured_ref: PLACEHOLDER. Run `gh workflow run cold-start-benchmark.yml -f mode=snapshot` on release-1.9.0 to populate.
_note: mean_ms=0 is a sentinel. Any real measurement will regress against this, which is intentional. The first workflow run on release-1.9.0 MUST be invoked via workflow_dispatch with mode=snapshot to overwrite this file with real numbers captured on the GHA Linux runner. measurement_mode encodes the comparison semantics (bytecode_compile_delta per D-11a); Phase 6 may change this when re-snapshotting. See .planning/phases/01-measurement-foundation/ Pitfall 11.
